message:
feat(web): Add system color scheme auto-detection

- Add ThemePreference type ('dawn' | 'dusk' | 'auto') to UI store
- Add getSystemTheme() to detect OS dark mode via prefers-color-scheme
- Default to 'auto' which respects system preference on first visit
- Add prefers-color-scheme change listener in useThemeEffect hook
- Theme toggle now cycles: auto -> dawn -> dusk -> auto
- Existing explicit user preferences preserved in localStorage

Closes: flywheel_gateway-r1x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
